test_cases.title: Status draft includes key sections
steps: Generate a status draft from workspace inputs.
Inspect the generated draft for key sections.
test_cases.expected_result: The draft includes what happened, open issues, decisions, and next steps.

test_cases.title: Targeted PM context is requested only when needed
steps: Generate a draft with missing contextual nuance.
test_cases.expected_result: The draft requests targeted PM context only for gaps that cannot be inferred from source data.
